rationale: Both reviews identify the same three real, material scope problems confirmed in the diff (bundled AffineAlgGroup, naïve IsUnipotent, True-stub ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup) and both recommend blocking. The only difference is Review 1's fix suggests removing the class entirely while Review 2's suggests splitting into separate classes, but either fix addresses the core unbundling issue and the resulting PRs would be equivalently sound on scope.
